name: French Sponge Cookies-Diabetic
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Beat egg yolks in a small bowl until very thick and lemon-colored. Add almond and vanilla extracts during beating.
4. With clean beaters, beat egg whites until stiff and shiny. Gradually add sugar, not more than 1 tablespoon at a time, while continuing to beat constantly.
5. Continue beating until the whites are very stiff and glossy.
6. Gently fold in the beaten egg yolks using a spatula.
7. Mix in the dry ingredients until well combined.
8. Using a small spatula and measuring tablespoon, drop batter onto ungreased baking sheets, spacing 2 inches apart.
9. Bake for 10 minutes or until light and golden brown.
10. Remove cookies from sheet to cool.
One serving = 4 cookies = 1 bread exchange CHO 11, PRO 2, FAT 2, CAL 67, Na 94
